operation: Full audit — optimizations, inefficiencies, Granny Codex 5 red flags
learnings: autoplay guard: set hasAutoplayed ONLY after play().then() success — not before the catch. Browser-blocked play() must not consume the slot.
visibilitychange/resize handler deps: never include React state. Use a ref instead. State in deps = re-registration = brief unlistened window.
kingdom-live-context: status='ok' ONLY when ALL primary endpoints succeed. Partial failure (agents endpoint down) must show 'stale' — ghost data at full opacity is worse than the stale badge.
Object.values() allocates array every frame at 60fps. 4 direct key lookups instead — no allocation.
Template literals in useFrame: pre-compute to useMemo stable strings. territory.color never changes at runtime so this is free.
instanceof THREE.MeshStandardMaterial: always type-guard before accessing material properties. Unmount race can produce null/wrong-type material.
agent_log: 2026-03-07T16:35:00Z — Self-audit: 2 perf issues found in CoreLoreCascade + TerritoryNode. Fixed pre-Granny.
2026-03-07T16:40:00Z — Granny Codex returned: 5 red flags. 2 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM.
